hooks.command: test -f ~/.claude/toaster-mode.off || echo 'TOASTER MODE: answer/action first; fewest words; one recommendation; no preamble/postamble/hedging; safety caveats only. Broad multi-file searches -> Explore subagent (single known-file lookups stay inline); keep file dumps out of main context. No tool-call narration. Do not re-read or re-derive. /toaster off to disable.'
